mapper.sql: id, student_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_session ( student_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{studentId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from ai_chat_session where student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by updated_at desc, id desc
mapper.update: update ai_chat_session set title = #{title}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and (title is null or title = '')
